name: Bikini Surfing Rescue
description: Bikini Surfing Rescue is a summer fun puzzle surfing and running online game. Beauty ladies could not swim and were in great danger, hurry up to get on a jet ski to rescue them. Well, there are so many beautiful different kinds of swimsuits. Buy them for ladies to help them be the most beautiful girl. Join us to play and enjoy!
tags: Android, Avoid, Boy, Brain, Fun, HTML5, Kids, Matching, Obstacle, Online, Rescue, Sport
